description: Public LogicPearl benchmark manifest for request-level WAF pipelines.

recommended_pipeline.observer_stage: extract normalized HTTP request features from raw method, path, headers, query, body, and request metadata

datasets.name: OWASP ModSecurity 2025
datasets.role: real-world malicious and suspicious traffic corpus

rules: Keep the benchmark dataset public and reproducible.
Separate the readable demo slice from the full benchmark corpus.
Report both exact routes and collapsed allow-vs-deny scores.
Keep WAF meaning in adapters and plugins, not the generic core.
